_comment: ADOPT (rc.14 · WS6): the service-level expectations for continuous assurance, mounted as docs/governance/assurance-sla.json and owned by the second line. A signal from any declared source opens a CASE (assurance-case-check.mjs); the case must be assessed within the severity's window, remediated by its deadline, and — for a runtime breach (high/critical) — record a CONTAINMENT action (suspend routine autonomy, block release, rollback, or model fallback). An open breach past its deadline blocks unless the second line risk-accepts it. Tune the windows to your risk appetite; the Loom validates and reconciles — the accountable decision stays human.
